content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To: File

Date: Nov. 3, 1982

Advice No. M-82-145

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Janis McLean and Bob Leidigh

Subject: Promise to Pay

An employer is a source of income to an official, if the official and the employer have made mutual promises (job offer and acceptance) and the agreement is specific in its terms. This constitutes a "promise to pay" $250 or more.

JM:plh
